name: mezzanine-ui-icon-creator
description: Create custom SVG icons that visually match the native @mezzanine-ui/icons set (130 built-in icons). Provides a style-locked authoring guide (16x16 grid, fill-only single-path style, cap/winding/knockout rules, path construction recipes) plus IconDefinition scaffolding and side-by-side verification workflow, so generated icons blend seamlessly with built-in Mezzanine icons.
